title: russelia multiflora
intro: Russelia multiflora, also known as Mexican firecracker or coral bells, is a flowering shrub native to Mexico and parts of Central America. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues such as respiratory problems, digestive issues, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Russelia multiflora has been used to treat coughs, colds, and bronchitis, while its antiseptic properties also make it effective in treating wounds and skin infections. Herbal preparations of Russelia multiflora include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and promoting overall well-being.
